headline.purpose: Page title only. One instance per page.

body.purpose: Primary reading size. Drop zone instructions, general UI text.

label.purpose: Settings field labels only. Uppercase uppercase treatment reserved for this role.

caption.purpose: File size numbers, spec pills, status strings, dimension data.

motion.name: ease-drop
motion.purpose: Drop zone border and background on drag-over.

breakpoints.name: max-width
breakpoints.purpose: Single centered column. No sidebar breakpoints.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action. Download ZIP, process images.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #E1306C; color: #fefefe; padding: 9px 20px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 0.15s ease, opacity 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #c82b61; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E1306C; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #555555; padding: 9px 20px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #222222; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; transition: color 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: #888888; border-color: #333333; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E1306C; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Spec Pill
components.description: Read-only metadata badge. Format, size limits, aspect ratios.
components.css: .ds-spec-pill { background: #111111; border: 1px solid #1e1e1e; border-radius: 20px; padding: 4px 12px; font-size: 11.5px; color: #888888; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-spec-pill strong { color: #cccccc; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Settings control. Target size, quality floor, max width.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; } .ds-field-label { font-size: 11px; color: #555555; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-input { background: #111111; border: 1px solid #2a2a2a; color: #e0e0e0; padding: 7px 10px; border-radius: 7px; font-size: 13px; width: 140px; outline: none; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; transition: border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #E1306C; }

components.name: Drop Zone
components.description: Primary file intake. Drag-and-drop or click-to-browse.
components.html:
📷

Drop photos here or browse files

JPEG · PNG · WebP — multiple files OK
components.css: .ds-drop-zone { border: 2px dashed #252525; border-radius: 14px; padding: 52px 24px; text-align: center; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, background 0.2s ease; user-select: none; } .ds-drop-zone:hover, .ds-drop-zone.over { border-color: #E1306C; background: rgba(225, 48, 108, 0.04); } .ds-drop-zone:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E1306C; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-drop-icon { font-size: 38px; margin-bottom: 14px; line-height: 1; } .ds-drop-zone p { font-size: 14px; color: #555555; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-drop-browse { color: #E1306C; cursor: pointer; } .ds-drop-zone small { font-size: 11.5px; color: #333333; margin-top: 6px; display: block; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Photo Card
components.description: Per-image result card. Shows thumbnail, sizes, quality, and download.
components.html:
IMG_4521_ig.jpg
4.20 MB2.10 MB
1080x1350px · q87%
Ready
components.css: .ds-photo-card { background: #0f0f0f; border: 1px solid #1e1e1e; border-radius: 11px; overflow: hidden; transition: border-color 0.2s ease; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-photo-card--done { border-color: #1a2e1a; } .ds-photo-card--error { border-color: #2e1a1a; } .ds-photo-thumb { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 1; object-fit: contain; background: #050505; display: block; } .ds-photo-body { padding: 10px 12px 12px; } .ds-photo-name { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; margin-bottom: 6px; color: #cccccc; } .ds-photo-sizes { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 11px; color: #444444; } .ds-photo-after { color: #4ade80; } .ds-photo-dims { font-size: 10.5px; color: #333333; margin-top: 3px; } .ds-photo-status { font-size: 11px; margin-top: 5px; } .ds-photo-status--done { color: #4ade80; } .ds-photo-status--error { color: #f87171; } .ds-photo-status--processing { color: #555555; } .ds-photo-dl { display: block; width: 100%; margin-top: 8px; padding: 5px 0; background: #181818; border: 1px solid #2a2a2a; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 11.5px; color: #888888; cursor: pointer; text-align: center; font-family: inherit; transition: background 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; } .ds-photo-dl:hover { background: #222222; color: #e0e0e0; } .ds-photo-dl:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E1306C; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Progress Bar
components.description: Batch processing progress. 3px thin bar, hidden between sessions.
components.css: .ds-progress { height: 3px; background: #1a1a1a; border-radius: 2px; } .ds-progress-fill { height: 100%; background: #E1306C; border-radius: 2px; transition: width 0.25s ease; }

narrative.overview:
A film photographer's workspace after midnight. Light is minimal. Surfaces are deeply dark, not dramatically black. The one source of color in the room is the safelight: Action Red (#E1306C), glowing just enough to mark what's actionable. Everything else recedes into tonal dark. Depth comes from layered darkness, not shadow.

Typography is system-native sans. Speed is the product; the font stack is a design decision that proves it.

Status colors are sealed. They are information, not decoration.
keyCharacteristics: Deep dark surfaces in graduated tones; warmth comes from tonal variation, not a brand color
Action Red is the only saturated moment on any screen; its rarity is what makes it directional
System-native typography: fast, honest, zero pretension
Flat by default: no shadows, no blur. Depth is tonal
Status colors are sealed to their semantic role, never stylistic

rules.name: The Safelight Rule
rules.body: Action Red appears on 10% or less of any screen. Buttons, focus rings, hover borders. The moment it appears on a card background, a heading, or a badge, the signal collapses.

rules.name: The Sealed Status Rule
rules.body: Status colors are sealed to their semantic role. A success-green button is prohibited. An amber heading is prohibited.

rules.name: The No-Uppercase-Except-Labels Rule
rules.body: Uppercase with positive letter-spacing is reserved strictly for label elements in settings fields.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows are prohibited. If the urge arises to add box-shadow, reconsider the tonal relationship between surfaces instead.

dos: Do use Action Red exclusively for interactive signals: primary buttons, input focus rings, drop zone hover, progress fill, browse link text.
Do use tonal surface layering for depth: Surface Base to Surface Card to Surface Input in that order.
Do use status colors strictly for processing outcomes.
Do keep focus states visible via Action Red border outline.
Do show original size, compressed size, and quality percentage on every card.
Do use system-native typography. No web font imports.
donts: Don't use Action Red on card backgrounds, headings, status badges, or decorative dividers.
Don't add box-shadow, backdrop-filter, or drop-shadow anywhere.
Don't apply uppercase letter-spacing outside label elements.
Don't use status colors in any context other than processing state.
Don't animate CSS layout properties. Animate opacity, color, and transform only.
Don't introduce sidebars, modals, drawers, or global navigation.
Don't add glassmorphism, blur, gradient text, or pixel-perfect light effects.
